effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), you may choose one of your opponent's cards imprisoned in your Prison. If you chose a card, your opponent puts that card on the bottom of their deck, chooses a grade 0 card from their drop, imprisons it in your Prison, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], until end of that battle, if the sum of the grades of the set orders in your order zone is three or more, this unit [Power]+5000, if it is five or more, this unit gets [Power]+5000, and it is seven or more, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, COST  [discard a card from hand], choose one of your vanguards, and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for every two of that unit's grade.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a grade 3 or greater unit, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
(After a set order is played, put it into your order zone.)
[CONT](Order Zone):During your turn, all of your front row units get [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):This unit gets all of the following according to the number of "Dispatch! Three Sisters of Cleaning!" in your order zone.
•One or more - During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
•Two or more - This unit cannot be chosen by your opponent's card effects. (Active on opponent's turn too)
•Three or more - If this unit is in the back row center column, all of your back row units get [Power]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: Let's all work hard today too, and do our best to clean up~

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one "Dispatch! Three Sisters of Cleaning!" or "Putzen Schwestern, Weepl" from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one "Dispatch! Three Sisters of Cleaning!" or "Putzen Schwestern, Bruush" from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your vanguard's original [Power] is 15000 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one "Dispatch! Three Sisters of Cleaning!" or "Putzen Schwestern, Weepl" from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Our work is perfect as ever, if I may say so myself.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed by riding from "Silhouette Man", search your deck for up to one "Machineries Factory", reveal it and put it into hand, and shuffle the deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[ACT](Order Zone):COST  [[Rest] this card], look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to one card with "Armed Arms " in its card name from among them and reveal it, put it into your hand if your drop has a card with the same card name, and discard it if your drop does not have it. If you put a card into your hand, put this card into soul. Shuffle the deck.
[ACT](Order Zone):If you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Silhouette " in its card name, COST  [put this card into soul], choose up to two cards with "Armed Arms" in their different card names from your drop, and call them to open (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC/GC):If two or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, this unit gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+10000.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's front row rear-guards, and imprison it in your Prison. (Put it into your Order Zone that has a Prison)
flavorTextEN: You have no chance of winning. If you want to surrender, do it fast.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose one of your opponent's imprisoned cards in your Prison, and put it into their drop.
flavorTextEN: Just apprehending them, don't you think that's lenient?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if one or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit by a grade 2 or lower unit's attack until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: To keep damage to a minimum. This is the reason for their actions.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if two or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO](Front Row RC):When your opponent's card imprisoned in your Prison is placed on (RC), that unit gets [Power]-5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Target of search warrant found. Begin tailing and attempt to restrain.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), your opponent chooses a card from their hand, and imprisons it in your Prison. (Put it into your Order Zone that has a Prison)
[CONT](RC):If one or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, this unit gets [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: Until the prison is full, our fight continues!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, you choose up to two unit cards from your opponent's drop, and imprison them in your Prison. (Put them into your Order Zone that has a Prison)
flavorTextEN: If you don't behave...*bzzt bzzt!* y'know?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if your Order Zone has a Set Order, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.

[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your World is Dark Night, this unit gets [Power]+2000. If it is Abyssal Dark Night instead, it gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, COST  [retire a Shadow Army token], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: Adapting to the night, howling at the night, and rejecting the night.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of each turn, if your World is Abyssal Dark Night, both you and your opponent choose one of your own rear-guards, and retire them. (Starting from the fighter of that turn first to choose the retiring unit)
flavorTextEN: The weak will perish. It will be clearer in the night.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one World card from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):When a World is put into your order zone, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your World is Abyssal Dark Night, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: The "cardinals" continue to guard the world through the nights where hope has collapsed.

nameEN: Causality Goes Crazy as I Will It
effectEN:
Play with this COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
Choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Analyzing unknown powers, and utilize them as weapons to defend the world.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
[AUTO]:When this card is put into order zone, call a Shadow Army token to (RC). (Shadow Army has [Power]15000 and Boost)
[CONT](Order Zone):If your order zone only has World cards, the following effects are active according to the number of cards in your order zone.
•1 card ‐ Your World becomes Dark Night.
•2 or more cards ‐ Your World becomes Abyssal Dark Night.
flavorTextEN: Eating into the little light remaining, the night grows deeper.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
Choose one of your opponent's attacking units, and it gets [Power]-5000 until end of turn for each of your opponent's cards imprisoned in your Prison. (It does not retire even if its [Power] becomes negative)
flavorTextEN: Your heart will be captured way before you are handcuffed.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, if you have a Set Order in your Order Zone, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call this card to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Crossing the stars to arrive. In order to meet new strong opponents.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have a Set Order in your Order Zone, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN:
Enemies hiding behind the building
will be cut in two with my famed scissors.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit attacks, if an opponent's card is imprisoned in your Prison, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: It is now the "Nova Grapple New Era". A ruthless competition among the strongest martial artists.

effectEN: [AUTO}(RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, if this unit was boosted, COST  [Counter Blast (1), Soul Blast (1)], draw a card.

(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
[AUTO]:When this card is put into order zone, draw a card.
[CONT](Order Zone):If your order zone only has World cards, the following effects are active according to the number of cards in your order zone.
•1 card ‐ Your World becomes Dark Night.
•2 or more cards ‐ Your World becomes Abyssal Dark Night.
flavorTextEN: The night is arriving. The night that is the void that will destroy the world.
Grab hold of the shining tomorrow with these hands! Jeweled Combination, Jewelion!

nameEN: Moment of Securing! Aurora Battle Princesses 24 Hours Coverage!
effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
If your opponent's hand has four or more cards, your opponent chooses a card from their hand, and imprisons it in your Prison. Then, if three or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, you choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your World is Abyssal Dark Night, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: The increase in polar cold monsters could be said to be the cause of the Ice Age.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and imprison it in your Prison. (Put it into your Order Zone that has a Prison)
flavorTextEN: That is a security robot belonging to "Cosmo Security".

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & [Rest] this unit], choose one of your opponent's front row rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: As though you are trying to gouge it, hit it! Hit it! Hit it!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and imprison the top card of your opponent's deck face up in your Prison. Then, if two or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your opponent's card is placed on (RC) from your Order Zone, Soul Charge (1).

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), COST  [Soul Blast (1) & discard a Set Order from your hand], and this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The sudden intrusion is also a culture of the industry.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):If your World is Dark Night, this unit gets [Power]+2000. If it is Abyssal Dark Night instead, this unit gets [Power]+5000. (Active on your opponent's turn too)
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, COST  [retire three Shadow Army tokens], and [Stand] this unit.
flavorTextEN: Barrel reboot. Offer it. Your body, and shadow.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of each turn, if your World is Abyssal Dark Night, both you and your opponent choose one of your own rear-guards, and retire them. (The turn fighter chooses the unit to retire first)
flavorTextEN: The weak perish. That is even more apparent in the night.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one World card from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: Analyzing an overwhelming amount of data, it predicts the arrival of the night.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC) or (RC), if you have a Meteorite in your Order Zone, COST  [Soul Blast (3)], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[CONT](RC):If your drop and Order Zone have a total of five or more set orders, this unit gets [Power]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)

effectEN: [CONT](RC/GC):If your drop and Order Zone have a total of five or more set orders, this unit gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, if this unit was boosted, COST  [Counter Blast (1), Soul Blast (1)], draw a card.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
If your opponent's hand has four or more cards, your opponent chooses a card from their hand, and imprisons it in your Prison. Then, if three or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, you choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: We've just witnessed the moment the crime syndicate was apprehended!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If your World is Abyssal Dark Night, this unit can attack your opponent's back row units.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), your opponent chooses a card from their hand, and imprisons it in your Prison. If it was imprisoned, your opponent draws a card.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose up to five Meteorite cards from your drop, return them to your deck and shuffle it. If you returned one or more cards, until end of turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000, if you returned three or more cards, it gets [Power]+5000, and if you returned five cards, it gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: You're a fool for challenging us with such capabilities.

nameEN: Aurora Battle Princess Dragnet, Intense Record of Great Pursuit!
effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (2)]!
Imprison all of your opponent's back row rear-guards in your Prison.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):Your Shadow Army tokens cannot be chosen by your opponent's card effects, and cannot be retired by your opponent's card effects.
flavorTextEN: A shadow can't be caught. It's as expected.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), draw a card, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, search your deck or drop for up to one Meteorite card, put it into your Order Zone, and if you searched your deck, shuffle your deck.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), Soul Charge (1) for each of your opponent's imprisoned card in your Prison.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If your order zone has a Set Order, this unit gets "Boost".

flavorTextEN:
(D-PR/096): You're suspicious! I shall arrest you on my authority!
(D-PR/216): Prevention of heinous crimes can be said to be an ideal job.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed by riding from "An Afternoon Nap Regardless of Place, Eva", search your deck for up to one Research card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: Hmm, hmm... I see!

(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
[AUTO]:When this card is put into the Order Zone, draw a card, choose a card from your hand, and discard it. If your Order Zone has three or more Research cards, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and bind it.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your World is Abyssal Dark Night, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call a Shadow Army token to (RC).

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from your hand during your turn, look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one Set Order from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: (D-BT05): Suddenly appearing and occasionaly protecting the city.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, if your Order Zone has two or more cards, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle. (Also includes your opponent's cards)
flavorTextEN: The city of my loved ones. I won't let you cause any more destruction!

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1)], draw a card, choose a card from your hand, discard it, if your order zone has a set order, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: All things constantly change. "Wishes" are no exception.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If your Order Zone has a Set Order, this unit gets "Boost".

effectEN: All of this card's abilities are currently unknown.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your damage zone has more cards than your opponent's, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Justice is ablaze beneath the mask when protecting the weak.

effectEN: • All of this card's abilities are currently unknown. However, it's known that, there are two variations (Right and Left), and through either their own abilities or that of "Gigant Arms Silhouette", both can be armed from rear-guard circle to Silhouette.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, choose up to one Meteorite card from your hand, and put it into your order zone. If you put a card, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: You dare oppose us? That is a foolish act equivalent to spitting at the heavens.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your opponent's unit is retired from (RC) or (GC) during the battle this unit attacked, imprison that retired card in your Prison.
flavorTextEN: I'll send all the bad guys that get in my way to prison!

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Soul Blast (3)], and your opponent cannot call cards by the ability of your Prison until end of their next turn.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)

effectEN:

[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your Order Zone has a Base card, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: A destructive power! With that, most things will work!

flavorTextEN: Rest assured! I shall protect the lives of you all!

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a grade 3 or greater unit, if your Order Zone has two or more Set Orders, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
[AUTO](Drop):When a Set Order you played from hand is put into the Order Zone, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call this card to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Victory that lies at the end of a heated battle. Seeking only that, the arms reach out.

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a Product card from your Order Zone, and Operate it. (Activate its Operation ability)

flavorTextEN: Passion filled with madness shall give birth to revolutionary new technology.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
Operate-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this card is operated, choose one of your opponent's front row rear-guards, and retire it. If you did not retire, choose one of your opponent's vanguards, and it gets [Power]-5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](Order Zone):When your grade 3 or greater vanguard is placed by riding from a grade 3, COST  [put this card into your drop], search your deck or hand for up to one "Mobile Fortress of Obliteration, Freischutz Maximum", put it into your Order Zone, and if you searched your deck, shuffle your deck. If you put it from your hand, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Known for its overwhelming firepower, the impregnable cannon strike fortress.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you did not operate a Product this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], choose a Product card in your Order Zone, and operate it. (Activate its Operate ability)
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you operated a Product this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000
flavorTextEN: 100% customer satisfaction starts with a detailed after-service.

effectEN:
[CONT](GC):If your Order Zone has a Meteorite, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), reveal the top card of your deck, put it into your Order Zone if it is a Meteorite card, and put it on the bottom of your deck if it isn't.
flavorTextEN: The stars shall rain down simply for realizing their ideals...
